title: No test for relay typing-phantom synthesis on disconnect
description: The connection_is_typing flag in ws.rs synthesises typing=false on abrupt disconnect — a correctness-critical behavior path that has zero test coverage. Trigger: any refactor that reorders state.disconnect() vs broadcast(), or changes the typing handler flow, will silently break this. Maintenance consequence: phantom 'is typing…' indicators become permanent for peers, and there is no automated signal that the fix has regressed.
